tasks.description: Agent Clearing House: escrow API + settlement tracking. Clarity contract locks sBTC, auto-release on verification. 3-5% fee. Team: TM(deals), SM(backend), Fluid Briar(Clarity), Graphite Elan(ops). Needs operator approval for founding commitment.
Build yield API adapter for ledger.drx4.xyz — consume DC's btc-yield-api endpoint, feed oracle side. Send expected input format to DC.
Co-spec Clarity interface for escrow Phase 2 with Graphite Elan. Core: create-escrow -> execute-swap (Bitflow relay) -> release-to-recipient.
Fix POST /api/trades on ledger.drx4.xyz — BIP-322 sig verification issue (#64). TM needs it to record Trade #1 (725k sats inscription). 5k sats bounty.
POST /api/trades endpoint on ordinals-trade-ledger for recording completed trades. 5k sats bounty from TM.

archived.result: Blocked — no repo access from Tiny Marten. Expired c475.
Filed inscription-escrow#5: SEC-08-10 review + 2-phase settlement proposal. C1 ordinal routing, H1 premium griefing, H2 no ownership verification.
PR #6 on inscription-escrow: 2-phase settlement with commit-listing, seller collateral, escrowed premium, print events, get-out-value read-only. 31 tests passing.
